display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Aroma of Chaos
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Aroma Of Chaos.png}} {{E|Aroma of Chaos|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Let Go}} {{TS|positive||{{2|Transform}} a card in your Deck.}}
{{Frame|Maintain Control}} {{TS|positive||{{2|Upgrade}} a card in your Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia. A mix of {{TS|purple||floral scents}}, {{TS|green||putrid decay}}, and {{TS|orange||something else entirely}}. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is warping and twisting. Overcome with a sense of {{TS|rainbow|up|shifting chaos}}, you begin to lose your sense of self.
{{Frame|Let Go}}
You give in and your mind {{TS|purple|up|drifts...}} You see yourself {{TS|blue||communing with friends}}, {{TS|green||fighting as a team}}, and {{TS|purple||dueling great foes}}. Is this a dream? Reality? Somehow both? Many sets of eyes perceive you and your dreams. Who are they...? You awaken after an unknown amount of time. The aroma weakens and its effects fade as you regain clarity. Upon restabilizing, you're more clearheaded than ever. {{TS|red|up|What were those eyes?}}
{{Frame|Maintain Control}}
Resisting the temptation to give in, you climb atop a tree where the aroma doesn't reach but its effects claw at your mind. Maintaining control is difficult; you tether your thoughts to your Core Principles. The aroma subsides.
== Trivia == * The "Maintain Control" outcome references the player character's "Core Principles", which change depending on which character is being played. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
